description: A sociologist needs to visualize the inequality of life expectancy within continents using the gapminder.csv dataset (C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\gapminder.csv). Create a report named 'Inequality_Analysis.pbix' at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Inequality_Analysis.pbix. The report must include a line chart showing average life expectancy (Avg_LifeExp = AVERAGE of lifeExp) by year with continent as the legend. Incorporate error bars into the chart using measures for minimum (Min_LifeExp = MIN of lifeExp) and maximum (Max_LifeExp = MAX of lifeExp) life expectancy as the lower and upper bounds.
